commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.sourceCode:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, Stack, Text, Box } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface Props {
  /** City name */
  city: string;
  /** Current temperature */
  temperature: number;
  /** Weather condition (Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, etc.) */
  condition: string;
  /** Humidity percentage */
  humidity: number;
  /** Wind speed */
  windSpeed: number;
  /** Temperature unit (C or F) */
  unit?: string;
  /** 5-day forecast array */
  forecast: Array<{ day?: string; icon?: string; high?: number; low?: number }>;
}

export default function GeneratedComponent({
  city = 'City',
  temperature = 0,
  condition = 'Unknown',
  humidity = 0,
  windSpeed = 0,
  unit = 'C',
  forecast = [],
}: Props) {
  return (
    <Card
      shadow="md"
      radius="xl"
      padding="var(--ggui-spacing-6, 24px)"
      border
    >
      <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)">
        <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
          <Text
            variant="overline"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)"
          >
            {city}
          </Text>
          <Text
            as="div"
            size="4xl"
            weight="bold"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
          >
            {temperature}°{unit}
          </Text>
        </Stack>

        <Stack
          direction="horizontal"
          justify="between"
          align="center"
          gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
        >
          <Text
            as="div"
            variant="bodyLarge"
            weight="medium"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
          >
            {condition}
          </Text>
          <Text
            as="span"
            size="3xl"
            aria-label={`Weather icon for ${condition}`}
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
          >
            {
              forecast?.[0]?.icon ||
              (condition.toLowerCase().includes('sun') && '☀️') ||
              (condition.toLowerCase().includes('cloud') && '☁️') ||
              (condition.toLowerCase().includes('rain') && '🌧️') ||
              (condition.toLowerCase().includes('storm') && '⛈️') ||
              (condition.toLowerCase().includes('snow') && '❄️') ||
              '🌤️'
            }
          </Text>
        </Stack>

        <Stack
          direction="horizontal"
          justify="between"
          align="center"
          gap="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
        >
          <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)" align="start">
            <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
              Humidity
            </Text>
            <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
              {humidity}%
            </Text>
          </Stack>
          <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)" align="start">
            <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
              Wind
            </Text>
            <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
              {windSpeed} km/h
            </Text>
          </Stack>
        </Stack>

        <Box
          padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
          background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
          borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-lg, 12px)"
        >
          <Stack
            direction="horizontal"
            justify="between"
            align="stretch"
            gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            wrap
          >
            {forecast.map((item, index) => (
              <Box
                key={`${item.day ?? 'day'}-${index}`}
                padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
                background="var(--ggui-color-surface, #fafafa)"
                borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
              >
                <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)" align="center">
                  <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                    {item.day ?? '--'}
                  </Text>
                  <Text
                    as="span"
                    size="xl"
                    aria-label={`Forecast icon for ${item.day ?? 'day'}`}
                    color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
                  >
                    {item.icon ?? '🌤️'}
                  </Text>
                  <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                    {item.high ?? '--'}° / {item.low ?? '--'}°
                  </Text>
                </Stack>
              </Box>
            ))}
          </Stack>
        </Box>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}

evaluation.critique: The component excels in design token usage and layout structure with proper spacing and responsive stacking. Main weaknesses are lack of interactive polish (no hover states on forecast items, no transitions) and missing wind speed unit flexibility (hardcoded 'km/h' instead of accepting as prop).

evaluation.critique: The component excellently uses design tokens throughout and properly renders all data from props without hardcoding weather examples. Layout is well-structured with appropriate flex/stack usage, though the 5-day forecast could benefit from horizontal scrolling for better responsiveness on small screens. Interactive polish is the weakest area—missing hover states on forecast cards and no transitions for visual feedback.

generation.sourceCode:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, Stack, Text, Box } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface Props {
  /** City name */
  city: string;
  /** Current temperature */
  temperature: number;
  /** Weather condition (Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, etc.) */
  condition: string;
  /** Humidity percentage */
  humidity: number;
  /** Wind speed */
  windSpeed: number;
  /** Temperature unit (C or F) */
  unit?: string;
  /** 5-day forecast array */
  forecast: Array<{ day?: string; icon?: string; high?: number; low?: number }>;
}

const conditionToIcon = (condition: string): string => {
  const normalized = condition.toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.includes('sun')) return '☀️';
  if (normalized.includes('cloud')) return '☁️';
  if (normalized.includes('rain') || normalized.includes('drizzle')) return '🌧️';
  if (normalized.includes('storm') || normalized.includes('thunder')) return '⛈️';
  if (normalized.includes('snow')) return '❄️';
  if (normalized.includes('fog') || normalized.includes('mist') || normalized.includes('haze')) return '🌫️';
  if (normalized.includes('wind')) return '💨';
  return '🌤️';
};

export default function GeneratedComponent({
  city = 'City',
  temperature = 0,
  condition = 'Unknown',
  humidity = 0,
  windSpeed = 0,
  unit = 'C',
  forecast = [],
}: Props) {
  const conditionIcon = conditionToIcon(condition);

  return (
    <Card
      shadow="md"
      border
      radius="lg"
      padding="var(--ggui-spacing-6, 24px)"
    >
      <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-6, 24px)">
        <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
          <Text
            variant="label"
            color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)"
            as="div"
          >
            {city}
          </Text>

          <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)">
            <Text
              size="4xl"
              weight="bold"
              color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
              as="div"
              aria-label={`Current temperature ${temperature} degrees ${unit}`}
            >
              {temperature}°{unit}
            </Text>
          </Stack>

          <Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)">
            <Text
              size="2xl"
              as="span"
              aria-hidden="true"
            >
              {conditionIcon}
            </Text>
            <Text
              variant="bodyLarge"
              weight="medium"
              color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
              as="span"
            >
              {condition}
            </Text>
          </Stack>
        </Stack>

        <Stack
          direction="horizontal"
          justify="between"
          gap="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
          wrap
        >
          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
          >
            <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                Humidity
              </Text>
              <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                {humidity}%
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>

          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
          >
            <Stack gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)">
              <Text variant="caption" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)">
                Wind
              </Text>
              <Text variant="label" color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)">
                {windSpeed} km/h
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>
        </Stack>

        <Box
          padding="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
          borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-md, 8px)"
          background="var(--ggui-color-surfaceVariant, #f4f4f5)"
        >
          <Stack
            direction="horizontal"
            justify="between"
            gap="var(--ggui-spacing-2, 8px)"
            wrap
          >
            {forecast.map((item, index) => (
              <Stack
                key={`${item.day ?? 'day'}-${index}`}
                gap="var(--ggui-spacing-1, 4px)"
                align="center"
              >
                <Text
                  variant="caption"
                  color="var(--ggui-color-onSurfaceVariant, #52525b)"
                  as="div"
                >
                  {item.day ?? '-'}
                </Text>
                <Text size="xl" as="div" aria-hidden="true">
                  {item.icon ?? '🌤️'}
                </Text>
                <Text
                  variant="bodySmall"
                  weight="medium"
                  color="var(--ggui-color-onSurface, #18181b)"
                  as="div"
                >
                  {item.high ?? '-'}° / {item.low ?? '-'}°
                </Text>
              </Stack>
            ))}
          </Stack>
        </Box>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}

evaluation.critique: Excellent use of design tokens and proper data binding from props with no hardcoding. The layout is clean and responsive with appropriate spacing. Main weaknesses are the lack of interactive polish (no hover states, transitions, or loading states) and missing wind speed units specification in props, which slightly limits data flexibility.

- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.
